SEARCH

Serialized Form

  • Package com.mycompany.model

    • Exception Class com.mycompany.model.InvalidCircuitException

      class InvalidCircuitException extends Exception implements Serializable

  • Package com.mycompany.view

    • Class com.mycompany.view.SwingView

      class SwingView extends JFrame implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • addCapacitorBtn
          JButton addCapacitorBtn
          Button which adds a capacitor to the selected node.
        • addInductorBtn
          JButton addInductorBtn
          Button which adds an inductor to the selected node.
        • addParallelBtn
          JButton addParallelBtn
          Button which adds a parallel group as a child of the selected node.
        • addResistorBtn
          JButton addResistorBtn
          Button which adds a resistor to the selected node.
        • addSeriesBtn
          JButton addSeriesBtn
          Button which adds a series group as a child of the selected node.
        • circuitTree
          JTree circuitTree
          Swing tree component that visualizes the circuit structure. This JTree's nodes wrap ConnectionNode or Component objects from the model.
        • componentTable
          JTable componentTable
          Table used to display a flat list of leaf components.
        • computeBtn
          JButton computeBtn
          Button which computes the equivalent impedance for the current circuit.
        • controller
          CircuitController controller
          Internal controller instance used for lightweight operations where appropriate. Note: the controller here is instantiated with a ConsoleView to provide a minimal view implementation for controller APIs; the Swing UI handles primary user interaction.
        • frequencyField
          JTextField frequencyField
          Text field where the user enters the frequency in Hertz.
        • removeBtn
          JButton removeBtn
          Button which removes the currently selected node.
        • resultLabel
          JLabel resultLabel
          Label that displays the last computed result.
        • rootNode
          ConnectionNode rootNode
          Model object representing the root connection node (top-level circuit). This field may be replaced when the user changes the root type.
        • rootTreeNode
          DefaultMutableTreeNode rootTreeNode
          Mutable tree node that wraps the current root ConnectionNode. Keeps a reference to the DefaultMutableTreeNode to allow moving children when the root type is changed.
        • rootTypeSelector
          JComboBox<String> rootTypeSelector
          Root type selector control (series / parallel).
        • suppressRootSelectorEvents
          boolean suppressRootSelectorEvents
          Flag used to suppress handling of programmatic selection changes on the rootTypeSelector.
        • tableModel
          com.mycompany.view.SwingView.ComponentTableModel tableModel
          Table model backing componentTable.
        • treeModel
          DefaultTreeModel treeModel
          Tree model backing circuitTree.
